use_cases: Switching between different content sections within a single view
Organizing dashboard content into categorized panels
Creating settings or preference interfaces with tabbed sections
Displaying product details with multiple information categories
Building multi-step forms or wizards with sequential tabbed views
ai_summary: A minimalist tabbed interface component built on Ark UI with full dark mode support and accessible keyboard navigation. The component features clean border-based styling for tab indicators, smooth state transitions between content panels, and proper ARIA attributes for screen reader compatibility. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with a polished hover and selected state system.
